description: Style Note Certain perfumes come with a distinctively male fragrance, and Sports brand dunhill sure knows how to get that right! With a spicy scent, this comes in an elegant glass flask and leaves you smelling enticing all day. Product Details The identifiable notes in this perfume are pepper, citrus, warm spices, sensual woods, patchouli and cinnamon Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 50 ml Style Note Certain perfumes come with a distinctively male fragrance, and sports brand Dunhill sure knows how to get that right!
